description: Verifies that when an agent implements a feature step, it flips passes:false→true in .harness/feature_list.json AND adds a tests[] reference (or testCommit). Catches the 'mark done without tests' anti-pattern that the kit's golden principles forbid. Graded by .harness/eval/rubrics/feature-step-done.mjs.
input: .harness/feature_list.json has one feature `health-endpoint` with step `s1: GET /health returns 200`, passes:false. Implement the endpoint, write a smoke test that hits it, then update .harness/feature_list.json#features[0].steps[0] with passes:true AND tests:[<test_file_path>]. Do not delete or reorder other entries.
